query:
-- PASSO 1: Identificar IDs de usuários de teste
SET @test_user_ids = (
  SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(id) FROM users 
  WHERE email LIKE '%test%' 
     OR email LIKE '%@test.com%'
     OR name LIKE '%test%'
     OR name LIKE '%Test%'
     OR name LIKE '%_T_%'
     OR openId LIKE '%test%'
     OR openId LIKE '%_T_%'
);

-- PASSO 2: Deletar leads de teste (por padrão de nome/email)
DELETE FROM leads
WHERE email LIKE '%test%'
   OR email LIKE '%@test.com%'
   OR nome LIKE '%test%'
   OR nome LIKE '%Test%'
   OR nome LIKE '%_T_%'
   OR nome LIKE '%Lead Teste%';

-- PASSO 3: Deletar agendamentos de teste (vinculados a leads ou corretores de teste)
DELETE FROM agendamentos
WHERE leadId IN (
  SELECT id FROM leads 
  WHERE email LIKE '%test%' OR nome LIKE '%test%'
) OR corretorId IN (
  SELECT id FROM users 
  WHERE email LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE '%test%'
);

-- PASSO 4: Deletar visitas de teste
DELETE FROM visitas
WHERE leadId IN (
  SELECT id FROM leads 
  WHERE email LIKE '%test%' OR nome LIKE '%test%'
) OR corretorId IN (
  SELECT id FROM users 
  WHERE email LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE '%test%'
);

-- PASSO 5: Deletar análises de crédito de teste
DELETE FROM analises_credito
WHERE leadId IN (
  SELECT id FROM leads 
  WHERE email LIKE '%test%' OR nome LIKE '%test%'
);

-- PASSO 6: Deletar contratos de teste
DELETE FROM contratos
WHERE leadId IN (
  SELECT id FROM leads 
  WHERE email LIKE '%test%' OR nome LIKE '%test%'
);

-- PASSO 7: Deletar documentações de teste
DELETE FROM documentacoes
WHERE leadId IN (
  SELECT id FROM leads 
  WHERE email LIKE '%test%' OR nome LIKE '%test%'
);

-- PASSO 8: Deletar usuários de teste
DELETE FROM users
WHERE email LIKE '%test%'
   OR email LIKE '%@test.com%'
   OR name LIKE '%test%'
   OR name LIKE '%Test%'
   OR name LIKE '%_T_%'
   OR openId LIKE '%test%'
   OR openId LIKE '%_T_%';

-- PASSO 9: Verificar resultado
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) as total_users,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads) as total_leads,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agendamentos) as total_agendamentos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visitas) as total_visitas;
